philippines.title: LOOK: Sea giant found dead in Catanduanes shoreline
philippines.description:
A dead sperm whale was discovered washed ashore in Barangay Batohonan, Sitio Ilo in Catanduanes, prompting an immediate response from fisheries authorities and local disaster officials. The Bureau of Fisheries and Aquatic Resources (BFAR) conducted on-site operations following the discovery, working alongside local authorities to assess the situation and manage the area....
Keep on reading: LOOK: Sea giant found dead in Catanduanes shoreline

philippines.title: NBA: LeBron unfazed as Lakers drop another clincher vs Rockets
philippines.description:
LOS ANGELES — LeBron James didn’t get overly excited last week when his Los Angeles Lakers rolled to a shocking 3-0 series lead in the NBA playoffs over the Houston Rockets despite playing without their top two scorers. James also isn’t ready to panic after his Lakers lost their second straight potential clincher Wednesday night, putting them halfway to making an unwanted bit of NBA history. READ: NBA Playoffs: Rockets beat Lakers in Game 5, avoid elimination anew “We don’t have a lot of time to dwell on it,” James said after the Lakers’ first-round series lead dwindled to 3-2 […]...
Keep on reading: NBA: LeBron unfazed as Lakers drop another clincher vs Rockets

philippines.title: Puerto Princesa police seize P270,000 worth of smuggled cigarettes
philippines.description:
PUERTO PRINCESA CITY — Puerto Princesa police confiscated suspected smuggled cigarettes in an operation in Sitio Bucana, Barangay Iwahig, here at dawn on Thursday, April 30. Acting on intelligence information and in coordination with the Bureau of Customs, personnel from Puerto Princesa Police Station 2 (PS-2) proceeded to Sitio Bucana at 1:20 a.m., resulting in the confiscation of eight garbage bags and four plastic sacks containing suspected smuggled cigarettes. The operation also led to the arrest of four individuals for alleged violation of Republic Act 10863, or the Customs Modernization and Tariff Act. The P26,000 boodle money used in the transaction […]...
Keep on reading: Puerto Princesa police seize P270,000 worth of smuggled cigarettes

energy.title: Russia Dismisses Price War Fears Following UAE Departure From OPEC+
energy.description: Russia will remain in the OPEC+ group alongside the remaining OPEC members and doesn’t expect a price war following the abrupt exit of the United Arab Emirates, Russia’s Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said on Thursday.  In a surprise announcement earlier this week, the United Arab Emirates (UAE) said it is quitting OPEC and the wider OPEC+ alliance effective May 1, to pursue its national interests. For years, the UAE has been working to boost its crude oil production capacity to 5 million barrels per day (bpd)…

energy.title: CNPC Pledges to Ensure China’s Oil and Gas Supply Amid Iran Crisis
energy.description: State-owned China National Petroleum Corporation (CNPC), the biggest oil and gas firm in the country, pledged to make “every effort” to ensure sufficient domestic supply of oil, gas, and fuels amid the Middle East crisis that has slashed supply to key markets, including China. Dai Houliang, chairman of CNPC, said on Thursday that the company would double down on supply security amid the external shocks, after the company directors met to discuss measures to implement to cushion the supply shock to the Chinese economy. Last week, CNPC…
